summary.notes: 33 new worktree tests + 59 pipeline regression + 4 workingdir + 38 blocked. All pass.

performance.notes: provision() observed ~52ms, teardown ~20ms on macOS local hardware.

owasp_checks.notes: Verified via source grep: execFile present, exec() with shell string absent, execSync absent.

owasp_checks.check: shellEscape wraps all user-supplied paths in spawnStage
owasp_checks.notes: Single-quote escaping with \'' for embedded quotes.

owasp_checks.check: runId short prefix (8 hex chars from UUID) cannot traverse path
owasp_checks.notes: UUID hex chars [0-9a-f] with no slash or dot characters possible.

owasp_checks.check: PIPELINE_WORKTREE_DIR with absolute path would break teardown derivation
owasp_checks.notes: See BUG-001 (Low). Env var documented as relative subdir; absolute paths unsupported.
worktreeManager uses only Node.js built-ins: fs, path, child_process, util.

owasp_checks.check: All worktree lifecycle events logged via pipelineLog
owasp_checks.notes: Events: worktree.created, worktree.removed, worktree.error, worktree.branch_deleted, worktree.orphan_reaped.

test_cases.description: Module exports are correct types
test_cases.notes: provision, teardown, reapOrphans are functions; WorktreeError is a constructor

test_cases.description: WorktreeError is an Error subclass with .code field
test_cases.notes: instanceof Error, instanceof WorktreeError, .name === 'WorktreeError'

test_cases.description: Module load has no side effects (no git calls at require)
test_cases.notes: No execFile calls at require time

test_cases.description: provision() returns correct metadata shape
test_cases.notes: path, branch, baseBranch, baseRef all present and correctly formatted

test_cases.description: provision() creates the directory and .git link
test_cases.notes: fs.existsSync verified for both worktree path and .git file

test_cases.description: provision() emits worktree.created log with durationMs
test_cases.notes: Captured from process.stderr; JSON.parse verified durationMs is number

test_cases.description: provision() throws NOT_A_GIT_REPO for non-git dir
provision() throws DETACHED_HEAD for detached HEAD
provision() throws WORKTREE_EXISTS for duplicate runId
test_cases.notes: Path collision detected before git call

test_cases.description: provision() uses execFile, not exec() with shell string
test_cases.notes: Source code static analysis via fs.readFileSync

test_cases.description: teardown(null) is a no-op
teardown(undefined) is a no-op
teardown() removes worktree from disk
test_cases.notes: fs.existsSync verified absent after teardown

test_cases.description: teardown() is idempotent (safe to call twice)
test_cases.notes: No error on second call

test_cases.description: teardown(opts.deleteBranch=true) removes the branch
test_cases.notes: git branch --list confirms empty after teardown

test_cases.description: teardown(opts.deleteBranch=false) preserves the branch
test_cases.notes: git branch --list confirms branch still present

test_cases.description: teardown() emits worktree.removed log
test_cases.notes: reason field matches opts.reason

test_cases.description: reapOrphans() no-op when .worktrees/ missing
reapOrphans() removes orphaned worktrees (no run.json)
test_cases.notes: Worktree exists before reap, absent after

test_cases.description: reapOrphans() removes worktrees with terminal-status run
test_cases.notes: status: 'failed' triggers removal

test_cases.description: reapOrphans() leaves worktrees with active-status run
test_cases.notes: status: 'running' preserves worktree

test_cases.description: reapOrphans() handles empty workingDirectories list
effectiveCwd() returns worktree.path when present
effectiveCwd() returns workingDirectory when no worktree
effectiveCwd() returns undefined for empty run
effectiveCwd(null) returns undefined
hasActiveRunInDir() returns false with no active processes
hasActiveRunInDir(null) returns false
First run on a directory has no worktree (solo run — backward compatible)
test_cases.notes: run.worktree absent in HTTP 201 response

test_cases.description: Second concurrent run on same directory gets a worktree
test_cases.notes: run.worktree.path exists on disk; branch matches pipeline/run-<short>

test_cases.description: PIPELINE_WORKTREE_ENABLED=0 disables worktrees even on conflict
test_cases.notes: Both run A and run B have no worktree when kill-switch is active

test_cases.description: buildStagePrompt solo run: GIT CONTEXT uses workingDirectory
test_cases.notes: promptText includes repoPath

test_cases.description: buildStagePrompt worktree run: GIT CONTEXT uses worktree.path (effectiveCwd)
test_cases.notes: promptText includes worktree path, not parent repo path

test_cases.description: 59 existing pipeline.test.js tests — zero regressions
test_cases.notes: Full regression suite: 59/59 pass

test_cases.description: 4 pipeline-workingdir.test.js tests — zero regressions
test_cases.notes: Working directory propagation unchanged

test_cases.description: 38 pipeline-blocked.test.js tests — zero regressions
test_cases.notes: Block/unblock/resolver flows unchanged

test_cases.description: worktreeManager.js uses execFile, not exec() with shell string
test_cases.notes: OWASP A03: Injection — confirmed via source text grep

test_cases.description: Short runId (hex UUID prefix) cannot inject shell chars in branch names
test_cases.notes: UUID hex chars [0-9a-f] only; no slash, dot, or special chars possible

test_cases.description: PIPELINE_WORKTREE_DIR absolute path advisory (Low)
test_cases.notes: See BUG-001. Server-side env var; low threat model impact.
